name: cursor-qa-vibefy
description: Agente de QA para Vibefy Hackathons - Playwright + playwright-bdd + TypeScript

scripts.test: node scripts/clean-reports.mjs && npx bddgen && npx playwright test
scripts.test:vibefy: node scripts/clean-reports.mjs && npx bddgen && npx playwright test --grep @vibefy
scripts.test:comfama: node scripts/clean-reports.mjs && npx bddgen && npx playwright test --grep @comfama
scripts.report: node scripts/ensure-report.mjs && npx playwright show-report reports/html
